# greenbaumlabs.com

> Greenbaum Labs is a personal AI workshop running on local compute. Founded by Justin R. Greenbaum. Builds diagnostic systems, analytical frameworks, and AI instruments for measuring organizational alignment. All inference runs on owned hardware — no cloud dependency.

## Primary Project: Coherence Diagnostic Engine (GL-001)
Measures alignment between what organizations say (center) and what the world observes (edge). Produces structured diagnostic reports scoring on Truth, Authority, and Continuity using the Coherence Triangle. Product category: Decision & Responsibility Infrastructure (DRI).

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://greenbaumlabs.com/): Workshop overview, infrastructure, projects, instruments, operating principles
- [The Field](https://greenbaumlabs.com/field): Orientation map of diagnostic and record regions
- [How the Instrument Works](https://greenbaumlabs.com/method): Measurement model behind the Coherence Scan — scoring, adversarial debate, evidence lineage
- [Multi-Agent Pipeline](https://greenbaumlabs.com/pipeline): Architecture of the six-agent Coherence Diagnostic Pipeline
- [Our Data Strategy, Published](https://greenbaumlabs.com/datastrategy): Prompting over fine-tuning, why collection is the ballgame
- [Autoresearch: Pipeline Hardening](https://greenbaumlabs.com/autoresearch): 73 experiments, 0.000 standard deviation — systematic pipeline hardening record
- [Agentforce](https://greenbaumlabs.com/agentforce): Personnel roster — 6 autonomous agents + 1 human architect
- [Sample Scan: Consumer Fintech](https://greenbaumlabs.com/sample-scan): Coherence Weather Map of a high-growth fintech — what organizational physics look like measured
- [Case Study: Diagnostic Engine](https://greenbaumlabs.com/case-study-diagnostic-engine): Technical deep-dive on the Coherence engine

## Diagnostic Offerings (Case Demonstrations)
- [Coherence Sprint](https://greenbaumlabs.com/case/coherence-sprint): What a Coherence Sprint reveals for leaders navigating structural dysfunction
- [Portfolio Diagnostic](https://greenbaumlabs.com/case/portfolio): What a Portfolio Diagnostic surfaces for PE firms evaluating acquisitions
- [Pre-Entry Diagnostic](https://greenbaumlabs.com/case/pre-entry): What a Pre-Entry Diagnostic surfaces before an executive hire accepts a role

## Coherence Lens — 18 Role Perspectives
- [Lens Landing](https://greenbaumlabs.com/lens): Same system, different lens — 18 seats, 90 reveals
- Roles include: Operator, Customer, Executive, Chief of Staff, New Leader, Investor, HR, AI Integration, Finance, Legal & Compliance, Product, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, IT & Infrastructure, Procurement, Program Management, The Board

## Lab — Experiments & Benchmarks
- [Lab Index](https://greenbaumlabs.com/lab): Experiments, benchmarks, field notes from the diagnostic infrastructure
- [Model Race: Gemma 4 vs Qwen3](https://greenbaumlabs.com/lab/gemma4-vs-qwen3): Head-to-head pipeline benchmark on a 709-document corpus
- [Autoresearch (Lab)](https://greenbaumlabs.com/lab/autoresearch): Pipeline hardening research record

## Diagnostic Instruments
- [FM Scanner](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/fm-scanner): Detect organizational failure modes
- [FFN Surface](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/ffn-surface): Surface early-warning field notes
- [System Nav Locator](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/system-nav-locator): Navigate the diagnostic map
- [Declaration Log](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/declaration-log): Record when authority acted
- [Verified Independence](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/verified-independence): Prove fixes are real
- [Regression Watch](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/regression-watch): Test if fixes hold over time
- [Continuity Chain](https://greenbaumlabs.com/tools/continuity-chain): Maintain meaning across time

## Infrastructure
- NVIDIA DGX Spark (Grace Blackwell GB10, 128GB unified memory) — primary compute
- Synology NAS (10 GbE) — filesystem-as-truth-store
- Mac Studio — interface and workstation
- Local models via Ollama (qwen3:32b, nomic-embed-text)

## Operating Principles
1. Own the compute
2. Filesystem is source of truth
3. Automation observes, summarizes, suggests — never decides (AR-001)
4. Ship gifts, not pitches
5. Build ahead of demand

- [Writing](https://writing.justingreenbaum.com): Essays on coherence and governance
